title: The Better Combat
description: Isn't Minecraft combat boring? Well with this modpack you can keep it vanilla with better movement, weapons and animations!
body:
This modpack improves the Minecraft combat with new weapons, animations and fixes. All mods are stable and work on the version 1.20.4.

This modpack adds the following mods/shaders/resource packs:

Fresh Animations (RP)
Entity Model Features (MOD)
Entity Texture Features (MOD)
Eugene's Lance (MOD)
Entity Culling (MOD)
Basic Weapons (MOD)
Better Combat (MOD)
ItemFig (MOD)
PlayerAnimator (MOD)
WeaponWorks (MOD)
Iris Shaders (MOD)
First Person Model (MOD)
Fabric API (MOD)
Not Enough Animations (MOD)
Sodium (MOD)
ComplementaryReimagined (SHADERS)

This modpack also updates some existing animations with the resource pack 'Fresh Animations' and 'Not Enough Animations (MOD)'. This gives the world more character with new and updated animations.

Showcased on my TikTok (Jinkaizen)
[https://www.tiktok.com/@jinkaizenn](https://www.tiktok.com/@jinkaizenn)
